Imports

../interpreter/ast, remote, configurator

Types

Packager = ref object
  remote*: RemoteSource
  flagNoCache*: bool
  flagRecache*: bool
PackagesTable = OrderedTableRef[string, VersionedPackage]

Consts

pkgrHomeDir = "/home/runner/.tim"
pkgrHomeDirTemp = "/home/runner/.tim/tmp"
pkgrIndexPath = "/home/runner/.tim/packages/index.json"
pkgrPackageCachedDir = "/home/runner/.tim/packages/$1/$2/.cache"
pkgrPackagesDir = "/home/runner/.tim/packages"
pkgrPackageSourceDir = "/home/runner/.tim/packages/$1/$2/src"
pkgrTokenPath = "/home/runner/.tim/.env"

Procs

proc cacheModule(pkgr: Packager; pkgName: string; ast: Ast) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, OSError, IOError, Exception],
    tags: [WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Cache a Tim Engine module to binary AST 
proc createPackage(pkgr: Packager; orgName, pkgName: string;
                   pkgConfig: PackageConfig): bool {....raises: [OSError, IOError,
    KeyError, ValueError, HttpRequestError, LibraryError, Exception, SslError,
    TimeoutError, ProtocolError], tags: [WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect,
    RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect, ExecIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Create package directory for pkgConfig Returns true if succeed. 
proc deletePackage(pkgr: Packager; pkgName: string;
                   pkgVersion: Option[Version] = none(Version)) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Delete a package by name and semantic version (when provided). Running the remove command over an aliased package will delete de alias and keep the original package folder in place 
proc getCachedModule(pkgr: Packager; pkgName: string): Ast {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve a cached binary AST 
proc getModulePath(pkgr: Packager; pkgName, path: string): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the file path of a Tim Engine module from a specific package 
proc hasLoadedPackages(pkgr: Packager): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Determine if packager has loaded the local database in memory 
proc hasPackage(pkgr: Packager; pkgName: string): bool {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
Determine if a pkgName is installed 
proc initPackager(): Packager {....raises: [OSError, IOError],
                                tags: [WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect],
                                forbids: [].}

    WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteEnvEffect], forbids: [].}

proc loadModule(pkgr: Packager; pkgName: string): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError], tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Load a Tim Engine module from a specific package 
proc loadPackages(pkgr: Packager) {....raises: [IOError, OpenParserJsonError,
    ValueError], tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Load the local database of packages in memory 
proc updatePackages(pkgr: Packager) {....raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect],
